LanguageData.WarOrphans.Letter.Label: War Orphans Arrived
LanguageData.WarOrphans.Letter.Text: {0} {1} orphans from {2} have arrived. Please take good care of them.
LanguageData.WarOrphans.Quest.Description: {0} has been devastated by war. {1} are desperate — they have {2} {3} orphaned children who will die without someone to care for them. They beg you to take them in.
